query:
SELECT id, vendedorId, mes, totalVendas, dataExtracao, status
FROM metricas
WHERE vendedorId = 2 AND mes = 'Novembro/2025'
ORDER BY dataExtracao
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user pKThLpGXzdZkTAu.ac53d9f9167d --database jUteHPSJGShqbZJcfArKWy --execute SELECT id, vendedorId, mes, totalVendas, dataExtracao, status
FROM metricas
WHERE vendedorId = 2 AND mes = 'Novembro/2025'
ORDER BY dataExtracao
